case_title: SOUTH CITY TOW INC DBA COURTESY TOW VS. RICHARD ANDERSON

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SOUTH CITY TOW INC DBA COURTESY TOW AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON, RICHARD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-16-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
